ability_description: A Paramecia-type Devil Fruit that turns the user's body into rubber, granting elasticity and immunity to blunt attacks and lightning.
A Logia-type Devil Fruit that lets the user create, control, and transform into fire.
A Zoan-type Devil Fruit that allows the user to transform into a human or human hybrid, gaining intelligence and reasoning.
A form of spiritual energy that the user channels to coat their body and attacks in an invisible armor, hardening strikes and defense and letting them hit intangible foes directly.
A heightened sixth sense that lets the user perceive the presence, emotions, and intentions of others, and even foresee incoming attacks moments before they land.
A rare willpower-based ability that lets the user exert their spirit to overwhelm and knock out those with weaker resolve.
A powerful kick-based martial art that channels the user's entire fighting strength into the legs, keeping the hands free for cooking.
A superhuman six-technique martial-arts style developed by the Marines, enabling feats like running through the air and iron-hard skin.
A martial art that uses water and palm strikes to send shockwaves through an opponent's body, devastating even on land.
The user becomes elastic and stretches their limbs like rubber.
The user turns into living fire and launches burning blasts.
The user becomes smoke, slips through gaps, and surrounds enemies.
The user transforms into sand and dries anything they touch.
The user freezes seawater and creates ice weapons from the air.
The user becomes lightning and fires electric bolts.
The user moves as light and releases laser-like beams.
The user produces molten rock that burns through weapons and armor.
The user secretes poison from their body and floods the area with toxins.
The user steals shadows and controls animated bodies with them.
The user creates thin strings, controls targets, and slices objects from a distance.
The user creates transparent barriers that block attacks.
The user changes gravity around targets and pulls meteors downward.
The user creates a spherical field where they can swap, cut, and move objects freely.
The user removes pieces of life force and places them into objects.
The user sprouts extra arms and eyes from nearby surfaces.
The user opens doors through walls, bodies, and even empty air.
The user travels through mirrors and traps opponents in reflected spaces.
The user changes the age of themselves and other people by touch.
The user changes bodies by injecting special hormones through their fingers.
The user turns living targets into toys and erases memory of them from others.
The user traps people and objects inside floating books.
The user turns their body into a living fortress that can store allies and weapons.
The user attracts and repels metal to build giant mechanical arms.
The user creates wax-like copies and disguises them as other people.
The user produces hardened wax to form armor, keys, and restraints.
The user creates bubbles that wash away strength and make enemies slippery.
The user fires a beam that slows anything it touches for a short time.
The user creates a zone where sounds cannot be heard.
The user makes any part of their body explode without injury.
The user changes their body weight from feather-light to crushingly heavy.
The user turns their limbs into sharp steel blades.
The user changes their legs into springs for explosive jumps.
The user turns their body into sharp dice-like segments.
The user becomes invisible and hides nearby objects as well.
The user pulls memories out like film and edits what a target remembers.
The user turns enemies and objects into distorted works of art.
The user becomes a jacket and controls anyone who wears them.
The user becomes bottomless mud and stores objects inside their body.
The user becomes snow and covers the battlefield with freezing powder.
The user becomes gas, removes oxygen, and creates explosive chemical clouds.
The user produces sticky candy syrup that hardens into restraints.
The user creates and controls biscuit soldiers with hardened armor.
The user becomes sticky mochi and reshapes their body to trap enemies.
The user raises their body temperature until contact causes burns.
The user releases chilling energy that freezes opponents on contact.
The user steals good fortune from others and causes sudden accidents.
The user transforms into a wolf and gains claws, fangs, and animal senses.
The user transforms into a leopard-human hybrid with claws and speed.
The user becomes a giraffe-human hybrid with a long neck and heavy strikes.
The user transforms into a massive bison and charges with great force.
The user turns into a phoenix and heals with blue flames.
The user transforms into a dragon and flies while releasing elemental blasts.
The user becomes an ancient dinosaur with heavy jaws and durability.
The user transforms into a mammoth and crushes enemies with tusks.
The user becomes a spider-like creature and traps enemies with webs.
The user transforms into a giant snake with venomous fangs.
The user becomes a horned insect with flight and piercing attacks.
The user heals injuries through supernatural liquid produced from their body.
The user corrodes metal weapons into rust by touching them.
The user touches a target and later redirects thrown objects toward that mark.
The user coats their fist in invisible spiritual armor before striking.
The user hardens their arm with concentrated spirit and blocks a blade.
The user focuses spiritual energy until their fist becomes dark and metallic.
The user imbues a sword with spiritual force to increase cutting power.
The user loads spiritual force into an arrow before shooting.
The user forms an unseen layer of energy around the palm to stop a punch.
The user lets spiritual energy flow outward from the body instead of only hardening the skin.
The user sends spiritual force through a target and damages it from the inside.
The user hits an opponent without direct contact by projecting force outward.
The user coats their leg in spiritual energy before kicking an armored opponent.
The user creates a defensive layer of willpower around their body.
The user prevents their sword from breaking by coating it with spiritual energy.
The user fires a projectile strengthened by focused willpower.
The user channels inner force through armor instead of trying to break the surface.
The user coats a staff in spiritual energy so it can strike intangible targets.
The user senses nearby presences without using eyesight.
The user detects fear, anger, and hesitation from people around them.
The user reads hostile intent and moves before the attack begins.
The user feels the location of hidden enemies across the battlefield.
The user briefly sees the next movement an opponent will make.
The user notices an enemy hiding behind a wall through spiritual perception.
The user dodges incoming strikes while blindfolded by sensing intent.
The user senses a distant target and aims without direct line of sight.
The user tracks a fleeing opponent by following their presence.
The user identifies the strongest presence in a large crowd.
The user feels danger seconds before a weapon is fired.
The user quiets their mind and reads the rhythm of nearby attacks.
The user estimates an opponent’s strength from their presence.
The user feels living beings even when they are underground or behind obstacles.
The user notices the exact moment an enemy decides to attack.
The user releases overwhelming willpower that knocks weaker enemies unconscious.
The user projects dominant spirit and makes opponents freeze in fear.
The user stares down a crowd and causes the weakest members to collapse.
Two users clash with dominant spirits before their weapons touch.
The user shouts with such force of spirit that animals and enemies submit.
The user suppresses weaker opponents through sheer presence.
The user frightens an attacker into dropping their weapon without physical contact.

The user directs spiritual pressure at one target and overwhelms their resolve.
The user releases a burst of willpower that makes multiple enemies pass out.
The user’s spirit clashes with another and cracks the air between them.
The user coats an attack with dominant willpower for a much stronger blow.
The user wraps a sword in dominant spirit before striking another weapon.
The user’s spirit-charged weapon collides with another and creates a shockwave.
The user’s overwhelming will appears as black lightning around their strike.
The user’s willpower-charged attack collides before physical contact happens.
The user quiets their spirit so enemies cannot easily sense them.
The user keeps their spirit steady and avoids revealing panic.
The user blocks an elemental body by striking with spiritual force.
The user lands a punch on an opponent that normal attacks would pass through.
The user reinforces their body with willpower to endure a heavy blow.
The user covers their torso in invisible energy before taking a hit.
The user predicts the direction of a slash before the blade moves.
The user senses a shoulder twitch and knows where the next punch will land.
The user reads the rhythm of an enemy’s breathing to anticipate motion.
The user senses a hidden attacker from the echo of their spirit.
The user detects panic and deception from the emotions of a target.
The user waits until hostile intent spikes and then counters immediately.
The user sends force into an enemy’s body without leaving an external wound.
The user releases stored spiritual energy from their hand at the moment of impact.
The user projects inner energy through an open palm to break armor internally.
The user pushes energy outward to stop a weapon before it reaches the skin.
The user knows someone is standing behind them without hearing footsteps.
The user senses an ally’s presence from far away.
The user’s presence makes weaker enemies hesitate before closing in.
The user’s sheer resolve sends a visible shock through nearby enemies.
The user knocks out a charging animal with a single glare.
The user blocks a cannonball with an invisible layer around the body.
The user grips an intangible opponent by wrapping the hand in spiritual energy.
The user expands perception outward to monitor attacks from every side.
The user sees a future strike and counterattacks before it is thrown.

The user releases a pulse of spiritual energy to stun weak enemies.

The user dodges because they sense the attacker’s intent before movement.

The user moves quickly through trained footwork and leg power.

The user kicks off the ground many times in an instant to vanish from sight.

The user runs along a wall using momentum and balance.
